name: feature-flags
tagline: Reference for React's feature-flag files, @gate/gate() test gating, adding new flags, and debugging channel-specific failures.
verdict: Well-structured, safe reference skill: no security exposure, clear triggers, worked code examples for its bespoke @gate/gate() syntax, and solid failure-path coverage for channel debugging. Gaps: no negative-trigger guidance despite covering several distinct scenarios, the /flags and /test commands are used throughout without an upfront availability check.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusions anywhere in description or body, despite covering multiple distinct scenarios (flags, gating, debugging).
Relies on custom `/flags` and `/test` commands (lines 56, 63-64, 69, 71) with no upfront declaration or availability check.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
